TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_lalusa, title = lalusa, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/lalusa} }

S.FORM: == lalusa == u zuma a kamu sa u pangkiw. lalusa cunus lalusa mahiza ku cacay. cacay ku tuud, palecadhan sa, u lalusa tu . u sulit nu Hulam 12 „ĀĮ, . u sulit nu Amilika One half is the irreducible fraction resulting from dividing one by two ( 1‚ĀĄ2), or the fraction resulting from dividing any number by its double. Multiplication by one half is equivalent to division by two, or halving; conversely, division by one half is equivalent to multiplication by two, or "doubling". One half appears often in mathematical equations, recipes, measurements, etc. Half can also be said to be one part of something divided into two equal parts. u sapuelac nu masatekeday a sulit lalusa: šłÄŚćä malalusa: šłÄŚćäÁöĄ lalusan: ÁĒ®šłÄŚćä tinaku ku kamu u Sakizaya (lalusa) Cecay ku tuki ayza ku lalusa iza ciniza a tayni. (Amilika a kamu: He came at 1:30.) (malalusa) malalusa nu pawti ku kalitang. (Amilika a kamu: Peanut installed half of the bag.) malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinenganňź 2ŚąÜ„Āģ1 One half
S.PHON: == r~…ĺar~…ĺusa == u zuma a kamu sa u paŇčkiw. r~…ĺar~…ĺusa ¶unus r~…ĺar~…ĺusa mańßiza ku ¶a ¶aj. ¶a ¶aj ku tuud, par~…ĺ…ô ¶adńßan sa, u r~…ĺar~…ĺusa tu . u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam ** *, . u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika on…ô ńßar~…ĺf is tńß…ô irr…ôdu ¶ibr~…ĺ…ô fra ¶tion r…ôsur~…ĺtiŇč from di*idiŇč on…ô bj two ( ***), or tńß…ô fra ¶tion r…ôsur~…ĺtiŇč from di*idiŇč anj numb…ôr bj its doubr~…ĺ…ô. mur~…ĺtipr~…ĺi ¶ation bj on…ô ńßar~…ĺf is …ô*ui*ar~…ĺ…ônt to di*ision bj two, or ńßar~…ĺ*iŇč; ¶on*…ôrs…ôr~…ĺj, di*ision bj on…ô ńßar~…ĺf is …ô*ui*ar~…ĺ…ônt to mur~…ĺtipr~…ĺi ¶ation bj two, or "doubr~…ĺiŇč". on…ô ńßar~…ĺf app…ôars oft…ôn in matńß…ômati ¶ar~…ĺ …ô*uations, r…ô ¶ip…ôs, m…ôasur…ôm…ônts, …ôt ¶. ńßar~…ĺf ¶an ar~…ĺso b…ô said to b…ô on…ô part of som…ôtńßiŇč di*id…ôd into two …ô*uar~…ĺ parts. u sapu…ôr~…ĺa ¶ nu masat…ôk…ôdaj a sur~…ĺit r~…ĺar~…ĺusa: ** mar~…ĺar~…ĺusa: *** r~…ĺar~…ĺusan: *** tinaku ku kamu u sakizaja (r~…ĺar~…ĺusa) ¶…ô ¶aj ku tuki ajza ku r~…ĺar~…ĺusa iza ¶iniza a tajni. (amir~…ĺika a kamu: ńß…ô ¶am…ô at *:**.) (mar~…ĺar~…ĺusa) mar~…ĺar~…ĺusa nu pawti ku kar~…ĺitaŇč. (amir~…ĺika a kamu: p…ôanut instar~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôd ńßar~…ĺf of tńß…ô bag.) mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan* **** on…ô ńßar~…ĺf
S.FORM: == lalusa == u zuma a kamu sa u pangkiw. lalusa cunus lalusa mahiza ku cacay. cacay ku tuud, palecadhan sa, u lalusa tu . u sulit nu Hulam 12 „ĀĮ, . u sulit nu Amilika One half is the irreducible fraction resulting from dividing one by two ( 1‚ĀĄ2), or the fraction resulting from dividing any number by its double. Multiplication by one half is equivalent to division by two, or halving; conversely, division by one half is equivalent to multiplication by two, or "doubling". One half appears often in mathematical equations, recipes, measurements, etc. Half can also be said to be one part of something divided into two equal parts. u sapuelac nu masatekeday a sulit lalusa: šłÄŚćä malalusa: šłÄŚćäÁöĄ lalusan: ÁĒ®šłÄŚćä tinaku ku kamu u Sakizaya (lalusa) Cecay ku tuki ayza ku lalusa iza ciniza a tayni. (Amilika a kamu: He came at 1:30.) (malalusa) malalusa nu pawti ku kalitang. (Amilika a kamu: Peanut installed half of the bag.) malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinenganňź 2ŚąÜ„Āģ1 One half
